task_description: Redesign the proxy pool system to support round-robin proxy groups with sticky and pure round-robin modes. Groups contain multiple proxy pools and rotate/stick according to mode. Each provider/connection can be assigned to a group or individual pool. Strict proxy mode fails requests instead of falling back to direct. The UI remains in the Proxy Pool menu with good UX including check-before-change logic and bulk remove functionality.
review_fixes: Addressed review issues: (1) Pool DELETE now cascades removal of stale pool IDs from proxy groups' proxyPoolIds arrays. (2) Health check runHealthCheckNow returns skipped+reason when isRunning, API route passes it through, dashboard shows warning notification instead of success. Issues 2/4/5 documented as acceptable per review guidance.
